emails.subject: Re: Your Consideration Appreciated
emails.body: Re: Your Consideration Appreciated Jeff, Interesting. Do you like this guy? What about Crude and products origination working for Randy? On the LNG front we should look at him if you like him but i don't think it is a no brainer. Neal will be coming on in 2 weeks, do we need him? Maybe we do. m

emails.body: this was the guy that hired fred d'ambrosia back to enron after he was terminated for cause. a.g. is an ok guy but i'm not in love. i would however put him through the interview process. i'll follow up. Mike McConnell 01/30/2001 06:54 AM
